title: CanonicalObject
description: An immutable, content-addressed record. The truth layer. Once written, never modified.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Must be '0.1.0' for this version of the spec.

id.description: Content-addressed identity: sha256:<hex-digest> of the stored payload bytes. This IS the object — the same payload always produces the same id.

object_type.description: Semantic category of this canonical object.

content_type.description: MIME type of the stored payload (e.g. 'application/json', 'text/plain').

size_bytes.description: Byte length of the stored payload. Must match the actual stored object.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of first submission. Immutable once set.

created_by.description: Identifier of the agent or human who submitted this object.

storage_path.description: Deterministic path in object storage. Format: canonical/{object_type}/{yyyy}/{mm}/{dd}/{id}.json

metadata.description: Optional free-form context. Not used for identity or content verification.
